texto: We can distinguish three groups of scientific men. In the first and very small group we have the men who discover fundamental relations. Among these are van't Hoff, Arrhenius and Nernst. In the second group we have the men who do not make the great discovery but who see the importance and bearing of it, and who preach the gospel to the heathen. Ostwald stands absolutely at the head of this group. The last group contains the rest of us, the men who have to have things explained to us.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Wilder Dwight Bancroft sobre temas ligados a saude mental. A afirmação “We can distinguish three groups of scientific men. In the first and very small group we have the …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a saude-mental, arrhenius, discovery, útil em momentos de discovery e nernst.

frase_original: We can distinguish three groups of scientific men. In the first and very small group we have the men who discover fundamental relations. Among these are van't Hoff, Arrhenius and Nernst. In the second group we have the men who do not make the great discovery but who see the importance and bearing of it, and who preach the gospel to the heathen. Ostwald stands absolutely at the head of this group. The last group contains the rest of us, the men who have to have things explained to us.

texto: Ostwald was a great protagonist and an inspiring teacher. He had the gift of saying the right thing in the right way. When we consider the development of chemistry as a whole, Ostwald's name like Abou ben Adhem's leads all the rest ... Ostwald was absolutely the right man in the right place. He was loved and followed by more people than any chemist of our time.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Wilder Dwight Bancroft: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Ostwald was a great protagonist and an inspiring teacher. He had the gift of saying the right thi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que motivacao, abou-ben-adhem, inspiracional pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e inspiracional.
